title: Make Viral AI Art Now
modules: Why AI Art Goes Viral: The Psychology of Shareable Visuals
Caricature Styles and Trends: What's Blowing Up Right Now
Prompt Engineering for Visual Impact: Getting the Look You Want
Building a Consistent Aesthetic Across Your Content
Platforms, Posting Strategy, and Growing an Audience
Turning Followers Into Income: Commissions, Licensing, and More
Ethics, Copyright, and Giving Credit in AI Art
Your Portfolio Drop: Launch Something Real This Week
synopsis: You've seen AI caricatures and stylized portraits flood your feed — this course shows you exactly how they're made and how to make ones people actually share. By the end, you'll have a personal art style, a posting strategy, and a clear path to turning your creations into something more than likes.
rationale: Visual AI content is one of the fastest-growing creative opportunities for young adults, but most AI literacy courses skip the hands-on, platform-aware skills needed to actually build an audience or income from it.
learning_outcome: Learners can create a cohesive series of AI-generated caricatures or stylized images and launch them on at least one platform with a repeatable content strategy.
